about.heading: About
about.intro: {years} years in B2B SaaS product design, currently focused on AI product experience. My background spans enterprise low-code platforms and cross-border e-commerce SaaS — full-cycle design capability from complex systems to global products.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Currently available for {roles} opportunities.
contact.resumeText: Detailed work history, quantified results, and full case context.

resume.strengthSummary: 6-year B2B/SaaS product design expert, proficient in driving business growth with AI. Led full-cycle strategy and design system construction for complex, global products.
resume.strength1Desc: 6 years of B2B/SaaS full-cycle experience, deeply understanding business models and growth levers. Particularly in cross-border e-commerce and the Shopify ecosystem, successfully led AI-driven growth strategies (e.g., Shopify Sidekick), linking design goals directly to business KPIs (conversion rate, efficiency, GMV) to drive closed-loop growth from experience optimization to business impact.
resume.strength2Desc: Proficient in user research, adept at deeply integrating AI tools like ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini and Shopify Sidekick into insight and decision workflows. High data sensitivity — capable of building multi-layered measurement systems covering AI output quality, user behavior, and business results, boosting decision certainty through data validation and establishing sustainable AI capability optimization loops.
resume.strength3Desc: Led Design System construction and cross-platform implementation, with full support for AI generation logic and international expansion. Through component abstraction and specification accumulation, drove team transformation from 'people-driven' to 'system-driven', providing stable infrastructure for rapid global business iteration.
resume.strength4Desc: Full-cycle capability from business insight to high-fidelity delivery. Skilled at abstracting complex AI capabilities (e.g., Shopify Sidekick) into intuitive, efficient merchant workflows, collaborating deeply with product and engineering teams to ensure high-quality delivery of intelligent experiences aligned with business goals.
